<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/deploy-quickstart-to-devnet.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-deploy-quickstart-to-devnet-bash-475" location="lines:475-479" -->
```bash
   curl -X POST "http://json-ledger-api.localhost:${LEDGER_PORT}/v2/dars?vetAllPackages=true" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
     -H 'Content-Type: application/octet-stream' \
     --data-binary @daml/licensing/.daml/dist/quickstart-licensing-0.0.1.dar

```
